display_text: Prince's Knife, Cost: 0: Tier 3 neutral item granting +60% Attack Projectile Speed and +140 Movement Speed. Its unique passive, Hex Strike, applies a 1.5-second Hex to the target of your next basic attack after a 10-second cooldown, turning them into a frog, which is a strong, instant-disable. This makes it a potent tool for initiating fights, catching mobile heroes, or setting up kills, despite providing no raw stats. Stats: CD: 10s, Duration: 1.5s, MS: +140, Projectile Speed: +60%.
